global.description: The ad features a vibrant red background with abstract shapes and clear messaging.
global.main_message: Promoting trending content with a call to action.

elements.label: Ad background
elements.description: Full canvas background of the mobile advertisement.

elements.label: Abstract shapes
elements.description: A combination of overlapping circles and squares in a light red background.

elements.description: A large square shape with a slightly darker red hue, positioned centrally.

elements.label: Abstract shapes
elements.description: A large circle shape in a lighter red tone, also centrally positioned.

elements.label: Small circle
elements.description: A small circle shape in a light red color, located towards the bottom.

elements.label: Trending message
elements.description: Bold white text stating 'Watch what's trending Cancel anytime' at the bottom of the ad.

elements.label: NeonCast logo
elements.description: The word 'NeonCast' in a bold, modern font at the top of the ad.

elements.label: Get offer button
elements.description: A prominent white button with the text 'Get offer' at the bottom of the ad.

elements.label: Sale badge
elements.description: A small yellow badge with the word 'SALE' in bold text at the top right corner.
